zh.Amington, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Hatton於1095年出生在英國爾哈頓時，他的父親William de Hatton20歲，母親Emma Darcsbury10歲。他於1120年與Eleanor Crispin在英國爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Amington, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Hatton于1095年出生在英国爾哈頓时，他的父亲William de Hatton20岁，母亲Emma Darcsbury10岁。他于1120年与Eleanor Crispin在英国爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hatton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

variants.name: Hatten
meanings: English: variant of   Hatton  . This surname is also common among African Americans.
North German: habitational name from the name of an area of marshland between Oldenburg and Bremen.

variants.name: Hattan
meanings: English and Scottish (Argyll): variant of   Hatton  .

variants.name: Aton
meanings: variant of Hatton , with loss of initial H-.
topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)).

variants.name: Heath
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(on the) heath’ (Middle English he(a)th, Old English hǣth) or else a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. The same word also denoted heather, the characteristic plant of heathland areas. This surname has also been established in Dublin, Ireland, since the late 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Hatton was born in 1095, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, his father, William de Hatton, was 20 and his mother, Emma Darcsbury, was 10. He married Eleanor Crispin in 1120, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Hatton est né en 1095, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Hatton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Emma Darcsbury, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Crispin en 1120, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Hatton 1095 in Hatton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Hatton 20 und seine Mutter Emma Darcsbury 10. Er hat 1120 in Cheshire, England Eleanor Crispin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Hatton è nato il nel 1095 nel Hatton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William de Hatton, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Emma Darcsbury, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Crispin nel 1120, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Hattonが1095年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父William de Hattonは20歳，母Emma Darcsburyは10歳であった。1120年にイギリスチェシュアイアでEleanor Crispinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Hatton(이)가 1095년 영국 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Hatton(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Darcsbury(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1120년 영국 체실르에서 Eleanor Crispin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Kinderton, Cheshire, England: Kinderton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Hatton nasceu em 1095, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Hatton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Emma Darcsbury, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Crispin em 1120, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Hatton родился в 1095 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Hatton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Darcsbury, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Crispin в 1120 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Hatton nació en 1095, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Hatton, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Emma Darcsbury, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Eleanor Crispin en 1120, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
